Stunt Rider

Are you fond of driving the best cars in the world and performing backflips? Stunt Rider is a 3D driving game where your main aim is to jump from sky-high ramps. Get on the pedal and move quickly towards platforms. Turn your car entirely by maneuvering left or right while in the air.

Play Stunt Rider Online

Loading game...
About Stunt Rider

Are you fond of driving the best cars in the world and performing backflips? Stunt Rider is a 3D driving game where your main aim is to jump from sky-high ramps. Get on the pedal and move quickly towards platforms. Turn your car entirely by maneuvering left or right while in the air. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Stunt Rider in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Car game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Stunt Rider for free?

Yes. Stunt Rider is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Stunt Rider?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
